prompt: Create a shippable desktop UI screen for 可行 CampusOps, an evidence-driven campus action workspace. Persistent shell: 248px white left navigation with green square 行 logo, brand 可行 CampusOps, nav 首页 可行 知享 队伍 执行 我的; 首页 is selected. Compact white top bar with title 机会工作台, calendar icon, avatar 张同学. Main content shows search and two underline tabs 比赛组队 and 校园活动 with 比赛组队 active. Build a dense opportunity workspace: a central list/table of four real campus competitions with columns 机会, 招募角色, 时间要求, 原文证据, 状态, and a narrow right rail 最近申请. Use real Chinese labels such as 2026 中国高校计算机大赛 · 鸿蒙高校创新赛, 产品设计与交互表达, 报名截止 07-31, 查看原文, 进入可行性分析. Keep actions emerald and source links blue.
style: Realistic production product UI, cool neutral canvas #F3F5F4, white work surfaces, charcoal text #171C1A, emerald #087443, evidence blue #175CD3, amber/red only for risk, crisp Chinese sans-serif, 1px #D7DDDA dividers, 4-6px radii, restrained and operational.
composition: Straight-on 16:9 desktop screenshot, compact sidebar and top bar, dense scannable rows, stable column widths, no device frame.
constraints: Render Chinese text cleanly; preserve the exact navigation and brand; no gradients, purple, blobs, illustrations, oversized hero, nested cards, excessive pills, perspective, watermark, or random English.
